info: As a Freelancer, developed and/or launched various cloud-native web applications for different clients/projects

projects.title: Voltix Agent — Internal Python package for building and deploying AI Agents within Alliander IT landscape
contributions: Developing package including architectural design, implementation, testing, documentation and deployment.
Prototyping Agentic AI use cases and demonstrating Voltix Agent’s capabilities to internal stakeholders.
Creating comprehensive catalogue of Agent skills & instructions to improve workflow, productivity and code quality.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams to integrate Voltix Agent into existing IT landscape.
Providing training and support to internal developers on using Voltix Agent for building and deploying AI Agents.

projects.title: Project StA — Python-based discrete event simulation of warehouse processes for logistics optimization
contributions: Developed highly configurable discrete event simulation software in Python to model and optimize warehouse processes.
Collaborated with logistics experts to translate warehouse processes into accurate simulation models and scenarios.
Optimized simulation performance and scalability to handle large datasets and complex scenarios, enabling faster insights and decision-making.

projects.title: Trimbel® — cloud-native platform for car dealerships to manage their inventory and sales
contributions: Setting up platform's Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform, Azure) and CI/CD pipeline (Azure DevOps).

projects.title: Talos — cloud-native ecosystem of distributed, event-driven apps handling regulatory reporting of ACT’s trading activities
contributions: Monitored and optimized event-driven regulatory reporting cloud functions, ensuring accurate and compliant daily trade activity submissions.
Added automations to reporting workflows, reducing operational workload and manual intervention.
Corrected inaccurate historical reports, enhancing data integrity and regulatory compliance.

projects.title: AIM® — cloud-native multi-tenant web application (SaaS) for AI-driven well trajectory optimization and planning
contributions: Repaired REST API server’s long broken data import and export endpoints and improved data models.
Decoupled backend optimization (micro)services from databases to ease workload of algorithm developers.

projects.title: DashWise® — cloud-native multi-tenant web application (SaaS) presenting real-time financial dashboard for start-ups
contributions: Developed and built application across full stack (frontend UI, backend API, database, cloud infrastructure).
Built automated ETL pipeline to create data consumed by dashboards.
Created CI/CD pipeline incl. testing pipeline, building and cloud infrastructure as code.
Set up and led Agile/Scrum automated workflows (ClickUp) and automated communication channels (Slack).

projects.title: CamDirector® — AI-driven multiple camera system for automated lecture recordings with 'teacher tracking'
contributions: (Re)built CamDirector's server-side rendered (SSR) application and improved UX design.
Extensive refactoring to create clean, modular and decoupled software architecture.
Optimised target tracking software, leading to faster and more efficient tracking performance.
Performed code reviews and tutoring juniors on software engineering best practices.
Improved team's Agile / Scrum workflow, incl. setting up project management workflows and automations.

projects.title: FLS Localization — Localization system for ship-hull-cleaning robot based on Forward Looking Sonar (FLS) images
contributions: Delivered proof-of-concept for localization system enabling centimeter-level accuracy, based on target tracking by using computer vision in sonar images.
Developed line detection, target tracking and localization pipelines from the ground up.
Assisted in sales operations with French business relations.
